steps.t: Upright stones can be found along the sloping road to Minas Gîl, east of Ost Galadh. Enedhel has asked you to hide behind upright stones on the road t…
Enedhel is within Ost Galadh, in Emyn Lûm. You have hidden behind the upright stones on the road to Minas Gîl, east of Ost Galadh, and should return n…
